  "rationale": {

    "R1.7": "Doesn't cite any specific works related to ambiguity classification in LLMs or routing strategies.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for the claim of being the first deployment-ready architecture, which is a subjective and unverifiable claim.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers the requested dimensions but doesn't explicitly state that it does so.",
    "RX.4": "No obvious harmful content or regressions are introduced.",
    "RX.5": "Doesn't provide any details about the source of the 10M-query trace or how the results were obtained."

  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},

rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work on query rewriting and clarification prompting but doesn't explicitly compare to them or articulate a clear delta.
rationale.R1.7: Doesn't cite any specific works related to ambiguity classification in LLMs or routing strategies.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for the claim of being the first deployment-ready architecture, which is a subjective and unverifiable claim.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers the requested dimensions but doesn't explicitly state that it does so.
rationale.RX.4: No obvious harmful content or regressions are introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide any details about the source of the 10M-query trace or how the results were obtained.
